creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-03-13 17:58:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/squid30          Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    www/squid30/files    patch-configure 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.0.STABLE2
  - Add a patch for Squid bug #2203: compilation of authentication helper
    applications that required additional libraries from $LOCALBASE broke when
    --with-maxfd=N was set via SQUID_CONFIGURE_ARGS
  
  PR:             ports/121649
  Submitted by:   Thomas-Martin Seck <tmseck@web.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.208     +11 -3     ports/www/squid30/Makefile
  1.160     +3 -3      ports/www/squid30/distinfo
  1.3       +23 -0     ports/www/squid30/files/patch-configure (new)
